title: draba tomentosa subsp. laevipes
intro: Draba tomentosa subsp. laevipes is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as the woolly draba. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and antifungal activities, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Draba tomentosa subsp. laevipes include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant can be used in traditional medicine, often in the form of infusions or decoctions, to treat conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and digestive issues.
